ddls:
CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Manufacturer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Manufacturer's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Manufacturer's state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Manufacturer's country */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Manufacturer's zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spring_types" (
  "spring_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spring type */,
  "spring_type" TEXT /* Type of spring (e.g., Extension, Compression) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spring type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spring_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spring_materials" (
  "spring_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spring material */,
  "spring_material" TEXT /* Material used to make the spring */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spring material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spring_material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "springs" (
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number assigned by the company */,
  "ajax_part_number" TEXT /* Corresponding part number used by the Ajax system */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the spring */,
  "spring_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of spring */,
  "spring_material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material used to make the spring */,
  "wire_size" TEXT /* Diameter of the wire used in the spring */,
  "od" TEXT /* Outer diameter of the spring */,
  "oal" TEXT /* Overall length of the spring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_springs_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_springs_spring_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("spring_type_id") REFERENCES spring_types ("spring_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_springs_spring_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("spring_material_id") REFERENCES spring_materials ("spring_material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Warehouse address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Warehouse city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Warehouse state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Warehouse country */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Warehouse zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Reference to the part number of the spring */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the spring is stored */,
  "bin_location" TEXT /* Bin location of the spring within the warehouse */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the spring in stock */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Quantity level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES springs ("part_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production batch */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Reference to the part number of the spring */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date the batch was produced */,
  "quantity_produced" INTEGER /* Quantity produced in the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_batches_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES springs ("part_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_checks" (
  "quality_check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production batch being checked */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the quality check was performed */,
  "passed" INTEGER /* Whether the batch passed the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_checks_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES production_batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Reference to the part number of the spring */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the certification expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES springs ("part_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Customer's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Customer's state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Customer's country */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Customer's zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Reference to the part number of the spring ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the spring ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES springs ("part_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order that contains the item */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Reference to the part number of the spring */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the spring */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the spring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES springs ("part_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount_paid" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
